data: Learn how to talk about past events in conversation

message:
Hey! Today we're learning how to talk about past events in conversation.

Sharing past experiences helps you connect with others and keep conversations interesting.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/09cd2eab-d8ca-488f-97ab-51485f073820-54.-Talking-about-Past-Events.jpg
button_text: Cool!

message:
When you want to talk about something you did in the past, use this structure:

"Last [time period], I [action] and it was a great experience."

For example: "Last weekend, I visited a science exhibition and it was a great experience."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/09cd2eab-d8ca-488f-97ab-51485f073820-54.-Talking-about-Past-Events.jpg
button_text: Got it!

message:
Here's another example.

If you attended an event last month, you can say:

"Last month, I attended a team building event and it was a great experience."
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/09cd2eab-d8ca-488f-97ab-51485f073820-54.-Talking-about-Past-Events.jpg
button_text: Next!

message:
This structure uses the simple past tense to describe events that already happened.

It helps you share memories in a natural and engaging way.
image_url: https://r2-activity-data.gosupernova.live/system-uploads/scenario-data/09cd2eab-d8ca-488f-97ab-51485f073820-54.-Talking-about-Past-Events.jpg
button_text: Makes sense!

message:
Let's practice talking about past events!

image_url:
button_text: Start Practice!

Select the correct way to talk about a past event

1.Last weekend, I visited a science exhibition and it was a great experience.
2.I went somewhere last weekend and it was alright I guess.

Correct answer: 1

Select the correct way to describe a past activity

1.Last month, I attended a team building event and it was a great experience.
2.There was a team building thing last month and some people went for it.

Correct answer: 1
Last&&weekend, I&&visited a&&science&&exhibition and&&it&&was a&&great experience.
Last&&month, I&&attended a&&team&&building&&event and&&it&&was a&&great experience.
Last&&week, I&&participated&&in a&&cooking&&class and&&it&&was a&&great experience.
Last&&holiday, I&&explored a&&new&&city&&with&&my&&friends and&&it&&was a&&great experience.
Last&&Sunday, I&&volunteered at&&a&&community&&event and&&it&&was a&&great experience.

first_message: That was incredible! Now we're going to practice by answering few questions in English. Can we start?
prompt_id: 4d3f5213-fcc4-40f3-879d-051908377a31
questions: "'1. Your friend asks what you did last weekend. How do you describe a past event?'

'2. A colleague asks how your holiday was. How do you talk about a past experience?'

'3. Your family member asks what happened at your office event last week. How do you describe it?'

'4. A friend asks if you did anything interesting last month. How do you talk about a past activity?'

'5. Your colleague asks about your experience at a recent training. How do you describe it?'"
